note: Synthetic post-visit feedback for the TasteBud demo. Verbatim comments the user left after visits.

feedback.comment: Cinnamon roll frosting was way too sweet — left half of it. Nowhere to sit either.
Quiet corner table and nobody rushed me for two hours. The mille-feuille is barely sweet — perfect.
So much fun with friends, but way too loud to go alone. Skipped the praline flight because of my peanut allergy — staff handled it well.
Calmest room in the city. The kakigori is the right kind of sweet — subtle.
They swapped the peanut sauce for tahini without making it weird. Pickup was ready in five minutes.
Pancakes drowned in syrup and the coffee was thin. Roomy booths though.
Plugs at every table and the canele is not too sweet. My default work spot.
Perfect for a loud group of five. Galbi set is the move.
Lovely dinner. The tiramisu was good but sweeter than I like — half was enough.
